title: calliandra lucens
intro: Calliandra lucens, also known as Pink Powderpuff, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calliandra lucens include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. Calliandra lucens can be used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
